subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of them that are in all creation, that they may cast away whatsoever they possess and turn unto God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی اذکر من فی الانشاء لیدعوا ما عندهم و یتوجهوا الی الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
